generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (IM) of the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentTopic
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measured motor encoder position of the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderTopic
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox encoder position of the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderTopic
]

instance MotorCurrentTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxEncoderTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

instance RawIMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor current IM data streamed via MQTT from the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance RawMotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor encoder position data streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance RawGearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw gearbox encoder position data streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CalculatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated motor torque τ derived from IM and motor position."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CalculatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity ω derived from encoder positions."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StructuralSysMLMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML model of the motor component of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingToolsEnabler
]

instance StructuralSysMLGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML model of the gearbox component of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingToolsEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the motor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the gearwheel dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the entire first axis system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for converting raw IM and motor position into torque τ."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for converting encoder positions into angular velocity ω."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tools used for creating structural models."
    DTDFVocab:enables EngineeringModelService
]

instance MultiLayerMBSEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Multi‑Layer MBSE platform for developing system models."
    DTDFVocab:enables MultiLayerMBSESvc
]

instance MatlabSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink used for executable simulation of motor and gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:enables MatlabSimulinkService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for streaming sensor data from the robot first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for semantic linking of DT."
    DTDFVocab:enables AASSemanticLinkingService
]

instance DashboardFrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard framework for visualizing DT real‑time data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization in a unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeFrictionInsight, MaintenanceDecisionInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of ideal and friction‑laden motor/gearbox behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationComparisonInsight
]

instance ModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic identification and updating of friction models during operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustMotionControlAction
]

instance DataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated and measured data for friction derivation."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDerivationInsight
]

instance EngineeringModelService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for handling structural SysML models."
    DTDFVocab:provides EngineeringModelInsight
]

instance MultiLayerMBSESvc : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing Multi‑Layer MBSE integration."
    DTDFVocab:provides MultiLayerMBEEEBDInsight
]

instance MatlabSimulinkService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink service for executing simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:provides MatlabSimulinkSetupInsight
]

instance MQTTStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling MQTT broker data streaming."
    DTDFVocab:provides MQTTIngestionInsight
]

instance AASSemanticLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling semantic linking via Asset Administration Shell."
    DTDFVocab:provides SemanticLinkingInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for visualizing data on dashboard framework."
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (Coulomb, viscous coefficients) used to feed back to motion control."
]

instance MaintenanceDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual insights into friction behavior guiding maintenance decisions."
]

instance RealTimeFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time friction insights displayed on dashboard."
]

instance SimulationComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated versus measured behavior for friction analysis."
]

instance FrictionDerivationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into friction model derivation from data comparison."
]

instance EngineeringModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the structural SysML models of motor and gearbox."
]

instance MultiLayerMBEEEBDInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight provided by Multi‑Layer MBSE integration."
]

instance MatlabSimulinkSetupInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on MATLAB Simulink simulation setup."
]

instance MQTTIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into MQTT streaming ingestion."
]

instance SemanticLinkingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on semantic linking via AAS."
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on dashboard visualization of DT data."
]

instance AdjustMotionControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust motion control algorithms based on friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time data exchange synchronized with the robot’s sensor polling (implied instantaneously during operation)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Asset (first axis) linked to its engineering model and sensor streams, a processing component that runs simulation models and generates data traces, an AAS for semantic description, and a dashboard aggregating the DT’s data points for user visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the operated stage of the first axis, providing runtime data and friction model identification after manufacture, but does not involve design or production phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Use of continuous identification of white‑box and black‑box friction models; traceability of data creation via processing chain; simulation models based on measured motor and gearbox parameters; validation by comparing simulated torque/velocity with real sensor data and refining models; acknowledged uncertainty due to wear and changing operating conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical robot and DT communicate over MQTT, with sensor data published on topics (e.g., /robot/axis1/current, /robot/axis1/angle). Asset Administration Shells may expose further APIs. No other specific protocol details are given."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for system architecture, MATLAB Simulink for executable simulation, MQTT as standard communication protocol, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for semantic interoperability per industry standards."
]
